articles.author: Kyle Orland
articles.title: Retro Rewind re-creates the glorious drudgery of working a '90s video store - Ars Technica
articles.description: What the nostalgic throwback lacks in complexity it makes up for in repetitive charm.

articles.author: Julie Bort
articles.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent - TechCrunch
articles.description: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.
articles.content: Microsoft is testing ways to integrate OpenClaw-like features into its existing Microsoft 365 Copilot tool. The new features, which the company confirmed to The Information, would be geared toward en… [+2637 chars]
